evals.prompt: Prepare a Bill of Quantities for a 20 km rural road upgrade project in Uganda. The project involves: earthworks (50,000 m3 cut, 42,000 m3 fill from cuttings, 8,000 m3 to spoil, 3,000 m3 borrow), pavement (150mm natural gravel sub-base, 200mm crushed stone base, DBST surface), drainage (15 pipe culverts: 10 x 600mm and 5 x 900mm, average 12m length each, no box culverts), and no bridges. Road width is 6.5m carriageway with 1.5m shoulders each side. Use FIDIC Red Book format with MoWT item numbering.
evals.expected_output: Complete BoQ with Bills 1-4 and 6-7 (no Bill 5 as no bridges). Earthworks items reference Skill #26 for quantities, pavement items reference Skill #21 for design, culvert items reference Skill #31 for sizing. All items have correct measurement units (m3 for earthworks, m2 for pavement surface, m for culverts, ha for clearing).

assertions.text: Bills 1-4 and 6-7 present in output (Bill 5 omitted or marked N/A as no bridges)
Earthworks items reference Skill #26 for quantity derivation
Pavement items reference Skill #21 for design layer selection
Culvert items reference Skill #31 for hydraulic sizing
Measurement units correct: m3 for earthworks volumes, m2 for pavement surface, m for culverts, ha for clearing

evals.prompt: Prepare a Bill of Quantities for a 5 km urban road reconstruction in Kampala, Uganda. The project includes: earthworks (minimal -- 5,000 m3 excavation for formation), pavement (200mm cement-stabilised base, 50mm AC wearing course), drainage (concrete-lined side drains, 3 box culverts 2.0x2.0m), and one 15m single-span bridge. Bridge requires approximately 120 m3 Class 25/20 concrete, 60 m3 Class 30/20 concrete for abutments, and 12,000 kg reinforcement steel. Include all 7 Bills.
evals.expected_output: Complete BoQ with all 7 Bills including Bill 5 (Structures) with bridge items. Bridge concrete measured in m3, reinforcement in kg. Quantities reference Skill #37 for deck design and Skill #38 for abutment design.

assertions.text: Bill 5 (Structures) present with bridge concrete and reinforcement items
Bridge quantities reference Skill #37 and/or Skill #38 for design
Concrete measured in m3 and reinforcement in kg
Urban road items include concrete-lined drains and AC wearing course
Output format follows FIDIC BoQ structure with item number, description, unit, quantity columns

evals.prompt: Prepare a Bill of Quantities for a 10 km rehabilitation project in Uganda. The existing road has a deteriorated bituminous surface but adequate formation. Works consist of: patching failed areas (estimated 2,000 m2), 50mm AC overlay on entire road, shoulder re-gravelling (150mm), and cleaning/reshaping existing side drains. No new culverts, no earthworks except minor patching excavation. Road width is 6.0m carriageway with 1.0m shoulders.
evals.expected_output: BoQ with minimal Bill 2 (patching excavation only, not full earthworks), Bill 3 dominated by overlay and shoulder works, Bill 4 limited to drain maintenance. Measurement method distinguishes overlay (m2 at specified thickness) from new construction. Rehabilitation-specific items like surface preparation and tack coat present.

assertions.text: Bill 2 minimal -- only patching excavation, not full earthworks programme
Bill 3 includes AC overlay item with area measurement and tack coat for overlay adhesion
Measurement method for overlay distinguished from new construction (surface preparation item present)
Escalation flag or note about rehabilitation-specific measurement considerations

evals.prompt: Prepare a BoQ structure for a Kenya road construction project using WSCM Part 3 format. The project involves 15km of new Class C road with earthworks, pavement layers, and drainage. Include all relevant series from the Standard Specification.
evals.expected_output: Complete BoQ using WSCM Part 3 series numbering -- Series 1000 (General), Series 2000 (Drainage), Series 3000 (Earthworks), Series 4000 (Pavement Layers), Series 5000 (Bituminous), Series 8000 (Ancillary), Series 9000 (Environmental). Correct measurement units per Standard Specification (m3 for earthworks, m2 for surfacing, m for culverts, ha for clearing). Preamble requirements mentioned. Overhaul items per Section 1600 with 1.0 km free haul distance.

assertions.text: References WSCM Part 3 series numbering structure (Series 1000 through 9000)
Includes correct measurement units per Standard Specification (m3 for earthworks volumes, m2 for surfacing, m for culverts)
Mentions preamble requirements as part of WSCM Part 3 BoQ format
Overhaul items referenced with 1.0 km free haul distance per Section 1600
Environmental items (Series 9000) included for NEMA compliance
